content: No matter how flawless a project is, it will fail if it focuses on the wrong target. The F-35 program, while a technological "masterpiece," continues to lose ground in the face of changing dynamics of modern warfare. Scalability, Speed, and Sustainability are the real keys to success.

linkPreview.title: The F-35 Is a Masterpiece Built for the Wrong War

content: The “close ties” between Microsoft and OpenAI are loosening. We’ll soon start seeing OpenAI everywhere (AWS, Google).
